title: hieracium dentatum subsp. expallens
intro: Hieracium dentatum subsp. expallens, also known as hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Hieracium dentatum subsp. expallens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. It can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
